docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,205.12 FILED BY CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT RASMI & BAHJEH ZIEDAN REVOC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PAUL SARMIENTO. DEFENDANT RASMI & BAHJEH ZIEDAN REVOC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: C.CHENG; NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RASMI & BAHJEH ZIEDAN REVOC $2,205.12 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,280.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT RASMI & BAHJEH ZIEDAN REVOC
